{{Infobox location
| name = Gray Island
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Gray Island Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Gray [[Island]] is a mysterious and highly fortified location situated to the north and east, characterized by its perpetual shroud of impenetrable mist known as [[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]]. This silver fog surrounds the [[island]] year-round, a phenomenon that even alchemists have been unable to replicate in laboratories. While the [[island]]'s exterior is designed to appear as a pristine, untamed wilderness filled with rolling green hills and dense forests—resembling an [[Imperial]] Park—this natural appearance is a deceptive facade maintained by [[Architects]] to hide its true nature. In reality, the [[island]] is a densely populated and complex [[labyrinth]] of secrets, traps, and hidden structures. It serves as the headquarters for the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]], housing approximately two thousand [[Consultants]], including five hundred and twelve students. The [[island]] is renowned for its ingenious defenses and deceptions, such as illusory landscapes that hide deadly poison or bottomless pits. Beneath its surface lies a vast network of catacombs, tunnels, and hidden chambers, including high-status prisons and massive underground arenas capable of seating tens of thousands. The [[island]]'s philosophy, rooted in the origins of the [[Am’haranai]], emphasizes being humble and natural in appearance while remaining incredibly complex internally. Though it has functioned as an independent retreat, it has been the site of significant conflict involving [[Imperialists]], the [[Navigator’s Guild]], and various other factions. Recent events have seen the [[island]] undergo major changes, including the disappearance of its [[Elderspawn]] and shifts in its characteristic mist, as well as battles that have left the landscape marked by recent warfare.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Located north and east of the current position, Gray [[Island]] is a land perpetually shrouded by an impenetrable wall of mist. This location, which features a long stone dock and a forest, was once the site of the original [[Imperial]] Prison built off the coast of [[Aurelia]]. While [[Naberius]] intends for the group to wait there, [[Calder]] is tasked with heading toward the [[island]], which serves as the approximate location of the [[Consultants]]. The [[island]]'s geography includes a chapter house situated deep within its interior, an [[arena]] located underneath the land, and a site where executions can occur. The [[island]] possesses an [[aura]] that can be [[Read]], and it recently experienced a tremor following [[Shuffles]]' announcement as a bright white dot appeared above it.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">16</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Gray Island]] is a location north and east of their current position.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Gray Island]] is shrouded in an impenetrable wall of mist year-round.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Gray Island]] is a location where executions can occur.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The original [[Imperial]] Prison was built off the coast of [[Aurelia]] on [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart]] might make it back to the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is to head for the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Gray Island]] is a location where [[Naberius]] wants the group to wait.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Gray Island]] is the approximate location of the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Gray Island]] has a long stone dock.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The chapter house is located deeper in [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Gray Island]] has an [[aura]] that can be [[Read]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[arena]] is located underneath the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A bright white dot appeared over the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Gray Island]] contains a forest.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Gray Island]] shook under [[Shuffles]]' announcement.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Eternal]] was waiting a day's trip out from the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Gray [[Island]] is a destination characterized by an untamed wilderness of hidden trails, tunnels, and clearings, featuring a [[labyrinth]] constructed by [[Jorin Curse-breaker]]. The location serves as a base for [[Architects]] and is home to two thousand [[Consultants]], many of whom lack family names because they were born there. While the [[island]] contains vaults of [[goldmarks]], an infirmary, and a room for [[Shera]], it is also defined by its traditions of concealment and absolute silence at night. The [[island]]'s landscape includes a seamless gray stone dock, trees where monsters have landed, and a center where a monstrosity looms over the forest. Within this land, a hidden high-status prison holds [[Urzaia Woodsman]]'s wife, and the [[island]] itself sits above the chamber where the tower stands.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">29</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Only [[Consultants]] born on the [[Gray Island]] have no family name.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Gray Island]] is a destination [[Kerian]] mentioned.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The dock on [[Gray Island]] is made of seamless gray stone.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Gray Island]] is a location [[Shera]] has ridden to on a [[Kameira]] before.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Gray Island]] is characterized by absolute silence at night.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The high-status prison on [[Gray Island]] is hidden.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Gray Island]] is home to two thousand [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Kameira]] wings its way toward the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Gray Island]] is a location where [[Architects]] are based.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]]'s left shear bears heavier [[Intent]] than any other weapon on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Gray Island]] is a location [[Meia]] could have returned to.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] trained on the [[Gray Island]] her whole [[life]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Gray Island]] is located above the chamber where the tower stands.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c9">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Urzaia Woodsman]]'s wife is locked up on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] can be restrained at the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Gray Island]] is a location that [[Bastion]]’s [[Shadow]] can reach.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Gray Island]] is characterized by untamed wilderness with hidden trails, tunnels, and clearings.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Gray Island]] contains a [[labyrinth]] constructed by [[Jorin Curse-breaker]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Champions]] and [[Great Elders]] will be present on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Gray Island]] is a land where an assassin kneels.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Gray Island]] is a location where trees exist and monsters have landed.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Gray Island]] has a center where a monstrosity looms over the trees.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Gray Island]] has a tradition of having everything concealed and difficult to reach.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Gray Island]] is the location where [[Shera]] and [[Calder Marten]] are fighting.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Gray Island]] has vaults containing [[goldmarks]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Gray Island]] is the location where [[Shera]] is located.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Gray Island]] has an infirmary.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The sun shines brightly on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] has a room on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Gray [[Island]] is a location featuring docks where the [[Guild]] reaches land and houses a prison. After [[Jerri]] previously departed from the [[island]], [[Meia]] sought transportation to return there, though a fight eventually broke out on the grounds. Following this conflict, which [[Calder]] survived, the [[island]] fell into a state of mess and [[Jerri]] was held within a cell. While [[Calder]] and [[Lucan]] met in the depths of the [[island]], [[Cheska]] and [[Teach]] discussed a coordinated assault. As an attack is being planned for the site, [[Calder]] is set to lead the charge, and the [[Consultants]] have since been scoured from the [[island]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">14</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Gray Island]] contains a prison.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] seeks transportation back to the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A fight occurred on [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Gray Island]] is currently in a state of mess.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] previously left the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] survived a fight on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Cheska]] and [[Teach]] discussed a coordinated assault on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] and [[Lucan]] met in the depths of the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] was held in a cell on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] will be leading the attack on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|An attack on the [[Gray Island]] is being planned.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Gray Island]] is a location where the [[Guild]] reaches the dock.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Gray Island]] has docks.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Consultants]] were scoured from the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Shrouded in a constant twilight, the Gray [[Island]] is a land of mystery, danger, and secrets that houses endless catacombs and a foundation of interconnected tunnels. The [[island]] is inhabited exclusively by [[Consultants]], though the [[Gardeners]] are sent there to perform labor and the [[Architects]] work to keep the landscape looking pristine and natural. While [[Jyrine]] once served as a prisoner on the [[island]], it is also a place where [[Ayana]] was left in care and [[Shera]] is occasionally sent for training. Within its borders, which include the [[House of the Masons]] and various traps, [[Shera]] is tasked with defending the location, a place where she need not worry about common thieves. Ultimately, a group intended to evacuate the [[island]] after [[Jorin]] had arrived there shortly before his acquaintance with [[Shera]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">16</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Jorin]] arrived on the [[Gray Island]] a few days prior to [[Shera]] knowing him.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Gray Island]] is covered by a shroud of twilight.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Gray Island]] contains endless catacombs.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Only [[Consultants]] live on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Gray Island]] has a foundation containing a network of tunnels.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ayana]] was left in the care of the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Gray Island]] is characterized by layers of mystery, danger, and secrets.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Gardeners]] were sent to the [[Gray Island]] to do work for the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Gray Island]] is maintained by the [[Architects]] to look natural and pristine.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Gray Island]] is a place where [[Shera]] does not worry about burglars and robbers.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Jyrine]] was previously a prisoner on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] is sometimes sent to the [[Gray Island]] for training.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] is tasked with defending the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Gray Island]] contains the [[House of the Masons]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Gray Island]] was filled with traps.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The group intended to evacuate [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] escaped from the [[Gray Island]] when the [[Handmaiden]] attacked.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Mining is occurring on [[Gray Island]] for its treasures.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] demands the return of [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] surrounds the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The lost territory of Gray [[Island]] is a fortified location containing various vaults and the headquarters of the [[Masons]]. While it serves as a resting place for the [[Regents]], the [[island]] is not held by the [[Gardeners]], and baby [[Gardeners]] have been removed from its prisons. The [[island]] may be under the control of the [[Consultant's Guild]], which maintains its headquarters there and enjoys a level of safety unknown to others. Although the [[island]] features a main stone dock alongside several smaller docks for secret departures, [[Jorin]] ultimately decided against blighting the entire landmass.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">15</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Gray Island]] has been lost.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Gray Island]] contains vaults.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] has spent barely a handful of nights on the [[Gray Island]] since killing [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Gray Island]] may be under [[Consultant]] control.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Gray Island]] contains the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] headquarters and ancient secrets.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Gray Island]] possesses great defenses.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Zhen]] can find out almost anything that happens on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Gardeners]] do not hold the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The baby [[Gardeners]] were pulled out of the [[Gray Island]] prisons.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] are resting on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Gray Island]] is a location where gardeners do not exist.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Gray Island]] has a main stone dock and many smaller docks for clandestine departure.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Gray Island]] is a location where the [[Masons]]' headquarters are located.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Consultants]] are the only ones on [[Gray Island]] who don't have to risk their necks.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jorin]] chose not to blight the entire [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|"It’s called the Gray Island," Andel finally said. "It’s north and east."<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“He wants us to go to the Gray Island and wait,” Calder said.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“We also need the Gray Island back. There’s more to it than just the Consultant’s Guild headquarters.”<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
